aeo_readiness.summary: The business has a solid foundation for AEO with a focus on local services and a family-owned approach, but lacks sufficient customer reviews and detailed content to maximize visibility.
quick_wins: Generate and showcase customer reviews on the website and Google Business Profile.
Expand service pages with more detailed content and targeted keywords.
Implement a blog strategy to target long-tail keywords and establish authority.

gbp_analysis.summary: The business does not have a visible Google Business Profile, which is crucial for local search visibility.
critical_issues: No active Google Business Profile found.
Lack of customer reviews and engagement on Google.

nap_citations.summary: The business has inconsistent or incomplete Name, Address, Phone (NAP) citations across the web, which can hinder local search performance.
action_items: Audit and update NAP citations across all major directories and platforms.
Ensure consistency in NAP information on the website and social media profiles.
Claim and verify listings on key local directories such as Yelp, Yellow Pages, and Bing Places.

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of Google Business Profile and customer reviews.
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Local search users and potential customers searching for roofing services in Florida.
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Creating and optimizing a Google Business Profile and actively managing customer reviews.
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Developing high-quality, keyword-rich content and establishing backlinks from local and industry-related websites.
